rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex syntax without changing unrelated architecture
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for the properties
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are the normal location for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
irrelevant_topics: Subcomponent ports in component type contracts
